title: courtoisina
intro: Courtoisina is a plant species belonging to the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the dogbane family. It is a climbing vine native to tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The Courtoisina plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against oxidative stress and cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and fever.
